paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05 as of July 17, representing a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include a story from simplywall.st regarding the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns and the completion of a $375 million convertibles deal. This news may be driving current interest in the company.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, as well as the resignation of director Miles Everson.
